# Feature Tasks: [Feature Name]

## Setup
- [ ] Read feature PRD
- [ ] Read feature tech spec
- [ ] Check global architecture docs
- [ ] Confirm implementation scope

## Implementation
- [ ] Create/update data types
- [ ] Create/update UI components
- [ ] Create/update page or route
- [ ] Add server/API logic if needed
- [ ] Add loading state
- [ ] Add empty state
- [ ] Add error state

## Integration
- [ ] Connect feature to main app flow
- [ ] Ensure navigation works
- [ ] Ensure styling matches project
- [ ] Ensure no unrelated files were changed

## Validation
- [ ] Run typecheck
- [ ] Run lint
- [ ] Run build
- [ ] Manually test main flow

## Completion
- [ ] Update feature PRD status
- [ ] Update feature tech spec status
- [ ] Update this task list
- [ ] Add any decisions to feature `DECISIONS.md`
